cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 衡平 · 勤友 · 元山
cover.subtitle:
노동·농민·백정·여성,
다섯 갈래의 같은 외침.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, 1920s Korean society. ONE Korean butcher (백정) man in white commoner hanbok and a wide woven straw hat, standing upright with calm dignity in a Jinju village square (조선형평사 reference), holding a single woven straw fan at his side. To his right, slightly behind: ONE young Korean woman in white jeogori and dark skirt with short bobbed hair (근우회 reference), holding a folded leaflet, looking forward. Background: a low whitewashed wall with a wooden gate slightly ajar. Color: warm cream + earth-brown + dark blue-gray + faint crimson sash on the woman. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 조선형평사 창립. 진주에서 백정 차별 철폐.
원산 노동자 총파업. 최대 규모 노동쟁의.

items.name: 강상호
items.desc: 진주 양반 출신, 백정 차별 철폐 주도.

outro.tip_headline:
"형평 진주 · 근우 신간회"
단체–배경 매칭 필수.
outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 조선형평사(1923 진주 백정)·암태도 소작쟁의(1923)·원산 노동자 총파업(1929)·근우회(1927 신간회 자매)의 연도와 지역, 어린이날(1923 방정환)과 색동회 매칭이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small balance-scale silhouette suggesting 형평 (equality). RIGHT: a small folded leaflet next to a tiny straw hat silhouette. Cream #F2EDE3 base + earth-brown #8B6F3A accent + faint crimson #B23A3A line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
